name: @pryzm/plugin-rhino-import
description: PRYZM 2 — Rhino 3DM import plugin (Phase 3-B Sprint S57). Reads Rhino .3dm binary files via rhino3dm WASM and produces a normalised RhinoSceneDocument (curves, meshes, layers, points). Per PHASE-3B-Q2-M28-M30-PLUGINS-IFC-DXF-RHINO.md §S57. Pure TS / Node-compatible (rhino3dm provides node WASM bundle).
